basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) has published the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Assistant position on a contractual basis. Candidates with a B.E./ B.Tech/ M.Sc. or equivalent in ECE/ EE/ Microelectronics/ VLSI Design/ Embedded Systems and allied subjects with at least 60% marks or equivalent and a maximum age of 30 years are eligible to apply online through the official IIT Jammu website. The application process is open until 08-07-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PH/women candidates as per the government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech/ M.Sc. or equivalent in ECE/ EE/ Microelectronics/ VLSI Design/Embedded Systems and allied subjects with 60% marks or equivalent
qualification.details: Project Assistant: B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent degree in ECE/EE/Microelectronics/VLSI Design/Embedded Systems and allied subjects with 60% marks or equivalent. 5% marks relaxation for ST/SC/PH candidates. Preference for experience on Verilog/VHDL and EDA tools (Cadence, Synopsys, etc). Students awaiting results may also apply.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_jammu_iit: B.E./ B.Tech/ M.Sc. or equivalent in ECE/ EE/ Microelectronics/ VLSI Design/Embedded Systems and allied subjects with 60% marks or equivalent

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Jammu Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Project Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Jammu Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent degree in ECE/EE/Microelectronics/VLSI Design/Embedded Systems and allied subjects with 60% marks or equivalent. 5% marks relaxation for ST/SC/PH candidates. Preference for experience on Verilog/VHDL and EDA tools (Cadence, Synopsys, etc). Students awaiting results may also apply.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Project Assistant Application Fee 2026
IIT Jammu Project Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PH/women candidates as per the government norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Jammu Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Jammu Project Assistant position is 08-07-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. or equivalent degree in ECE/EE/Microelectronics/VLSI Design/Embedded Systems and allied subjects with at least 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/PH/women candidates as per the government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position at IIT Jammu.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST, Women) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Can students awaiting their final results apply?
faq.answer: Yes, students who are awaiting their results are also eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
